mapper.select: SELECT RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ITEM_NM, RA_MDL_GBN_CD, REFF_COMN_CD, MISS_VAL_SCR, INTV_VAL_YN, USE_YN, SRT_SQ, LST_APP_NO, REG_DT FROM RA_ITEM ORDER BY SRT_SQ ASC
SELECT RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ITEM_NM, RA_MDL_GBN_CD, REFF_COMN_CD, MISS_VAL_SCR, INTV_VAL_YN, USE_YN, SRT_SQ, LST_APP_NO, REG_DT FROM RA_ITEM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SRT_SQ ASC
SELECT RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ITEM_NM, RA_MDL_GBN_CD, REFF_COMN_CD, MISS_VAL_SCR, INTV_VAL_YN, USE_YN, SRT_SQ, LST_APP_NO, REG_DT FROM RA_ITEM WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{raItemCd}

SELECT W.RA_ITEM_CD, W.RA_MDL_GBN_CD, W.WGHT, W.MAX_SCR, W.USE_YN, I.RA_ITEM_NM FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT W JOIN RA_ITEM I ON I.RA_ITEM_CD = W.RA_ITEM_CD WHERE W.RA_MDL_GBN_CD = #{raMdlGbnCd} AND W.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY I.SRT_SQ ASC
SELECT RA_GRD FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE #{raScr} >= GRD_SCR_MIN AND #{raScr} <= GRD_SCR_MAX LIMIT 1
SELECT RA_GRD FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE #{raScr} >= GRD_SCR_MIN AND #{raScr} <= GRD_SCR_MAX AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_RESULT_DTL (RA_ID, RA_ITEM_CD, ITEM_VAL, ITEM_SCR, ITEM_WGHT, ITEM_LST_SCR, REG_DT) VALUES (#{raId}, #{raItemCd}, #{itemVal}, #{itemScr}, #{itemWght}, #{itemLstScr}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO RA_RESULT_DTL (RA_ID, RA_ITEM_CD, ITEM_VAL, ITEM_SCR, ITEM_WGHT, ITEM_LST_SCR, REG_DT) VALUES (#{raId}, #{raItemCd}, #{itemVal}, #{itemScr}, #{itemWght}, #{itemLstScr}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT RA_ID, RNMCNO, EVAL_DT, RA_GRD, RA_SCR, EDD_F, NEXT_EVAL_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM RA_RESULT WHERE RA_ID = #{raId}
SELECT RA_DTL_ID, RA_ID, RA_ITEM_CD, ITEM_VAL, ITEM_SCR, ITEM_WGHT, ITEM_LST_SCR, REG_DT FROM RA_RESULT_DTL WHERE RA_ID = #{raId} ORDER BY RA_DTL_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE RA_RESULT SET RA_SCR = #{raScr}, RA_GRD = #{raGrd}, EDD_F = #{eddYn}, NEXT_EVAL_DT = #{nextEvalDt}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE RA_ID = #{raId}
mapper.select: SELECT RA_ID, RNMCNO, EVAL_DT, RA_GRD, RA_SCR, EDD_F, NEXT_EVAL_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM RA_RESULT WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT RA_ID, RNMCNO, EVAL_DT, RA_GRD, RA_SCR, EDD_F, NEXT_EVAL_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM ( SELECT RA_ID, RNMCNO, EVAL_DT, RA_GRD, RA_SCR, EDD_F, NEXT_EVAL_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM RA_RESULT WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
